result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The file contains 14,105 observations with 4 variables: NSID, imd15 (age 15 deprivation score), imd16 (age 16 deprivation score), and imd32 (age 32 deprivation score). All area deprivation variables have been harmonised with standard missing-value codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know/insufficient information, -3=Not asked/not interviewed, -2=Script error, -1=Not applicable). The wave-specific missing code -94 was recoded to -8, and NA values were recoded to -3. All variables are labelled numeric continuous variables as required.
